name: Side Street Inn (Kapahulu)
tagline: Where Honolulu's best chefs eat on their nights off — the pan-fried pork chops and signature fried rice are legendary for a reason.
parking: Small lot behind building, street parking on side streets
talkStory: Second location of Colin Nishida's legendary Side Street Inn, opened on Kapahulu Ave to be closer to the Kaimuki/Kapahulu dining crowd. Same massive portions and chef-industry following as the original.
insiderTips: Mon–Fri from 4pm, dine-in. Weekends get busy.
